subcodes.title: Words to some friends, spoken on 1915-03-14
subcodes.first_line: How important is the cleanliness of the body! It is well-expressed that cleanliness is godliness: because this body is the spiritual temple of the Almighty, it must be kept clean and pure.
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @cleanliness and refinement, @chastity and purity
